text:
On 16/02/2014 18:01, Mathieu Arnold wrote:
> Does this new option needs the XML option to be on too ?

Yes it does.

> Also, I think you mean BIND 9.10, not BIND 10, which is not really a
> finished product and has a good chance to never be finished.

Both.  Either.  Whatever.

	Matthew
